allow: Bash(node -e "function seg\(s\){return s.replace\(/\\.\\./g,''\).replace\(/[<>:|?*]/g,''\).replace\(/^\\./,''\).trim\(\).slice\(0,200\)} function p\(raw\){return raw.split\('/'\).map\(seg\).filter\(Boolean\).join\('/'\)} console.log\(p\('../../../etc/passwd'\)\); console.log\(p\('AI Chats/test'\)\); console.log\(p\('<script>x</script>'\)\); console.log\(p\('normal/path'\)\)")
